original_body: LIMITED OFFER!! Buy now and get a FREE TRIAL of our amazing platform! Click here to get started: https://example.com/signup. Don't miss this INCREDIBLE DEAL — act fast before it's gone! Visit https://example.com/pricing and https://example.com/demo for more info!
